title: SNS SMS Delivery Analysis
description: Analyze SMS delivery success rates, costs, and message types using SNS delivery status logs for monitoring and optimization

introBox.headline: How it works
text: Analyzes SNS SMS delivery status logs to track success rates and costs by message type
Requires selecting BOTH success and failure log groups in CloudWatch Logs Insights for complete analysis
SMS delivery status logging must be enabled with proper IAM role configuration
